prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_investigation_candidate primary_component_a)
(attach_diagnostic_tool_to_entity primary_component_a diagnostic_analyzer)
(assign_test_case_to_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(prepare_analysis_for_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(mark_interface_stable primary_component_a interface_v1 test_case_repro)
(detach_test_case_from_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(register_investigation_candidate dependent_component_b)
(attach_diagnostic_tool_to_entity dependent_component_b diagnostic_profiler)
(assign_test_case_to_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(prepare_analysis_for_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(mark_protocol_state_stable dependent_component_b protocol_state_v1 test_case_repro)
(attach_execution_environment_to_entity primary_component_a execution_env_docker)
(finalize_primary_component_ready primary_component_a interface_v1 execution_env_docker)
(detach_execution_environment_from_entity primary_component_a execution_env_docker)
(attach_execution_environment_to_entity dependent_component_b execution_env_docker)
(finalize_dependent_component_ready dependent_component_b protocol_state_v1 execution_env_docker)
(assemble_patch_bundle primary_component_a dependent_component_b interface_v1 protocol_state_v1 patch_bundle_initial)
(detach_test_case_from_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(assign_test_case_to_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(mark_patch_bundle_tested patch_bundle_initial primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(mark_primary_component_diagnosed primary_component_a patch_bundle_initial)
(mark_dependent_component_diagnosed dependent_component_b patch_bundle_initial)
(assign_fix_candidate_to_entity primary_component_a trace_record_1 test_case_repro)
(apply_fix_to_primary_component primary_component_a diagnostic_analyzer trace_record_1)
(detach_test_case_from_entity primary_component_a test_case_repro)
(assign_test_case_to_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(assign_fix_candidate_to_entity dependent_component_b trace_record_1 test_case_repro)
(apply_fix_to_dependent_component dependent_component_b diagnostic_profiler trace_record_1)
(detach_test_case_from_entity dependent_component_b test_case_repro)
(register_investigation_candidate repository_module_core)
(attach_diagnostic_tool_to_entity repository_module_core diagnostic_tracer)
(assign_test_case_to_entity repository_module_core test_case_repro)
(prepare_analysis_for_entity repository_module_core test_case_repro)
(execute_test_suite_against_bundle repository_module_core regression_suite_a patch_bundle_initial)
(flag_module_preparation repository_module_core regression_suite_a patch_bundle_initial test_case_repro)
(attach_binary_artifact_to_module repository_module_core binary_artifact_v1)
(attach_execution_environment_to_entity repository_module_core execution_env_docker)
(mark_module_build_ready_without_protocol_flag repository_module_core binary_artifact_v1 execution_env_docker regression_suite_a patch_bundle_initial)
(attach_review_note_to_module repository_module_core review_note_initial)
(start_module_review repository_module_core review_note_initial regression_suite_a patch_bundle_initial)
(finalize_module_verification_without_label repository_module_core)
(assign_fix_candidate_to_entity repository_module_core trace_record_1 test_case_repro)
(apply_fix_to_module repository_module_core diagnostic_tracer trace_record_1)
(detach_test_case_from_entity repository_module_core test_case_repro)
(detach_binary_artifact_from_module repository_module_core binary_artifact_v1)
(detach_review_note_from_module repository_module_core review_note_initial)
(detach_execution_environment_from_entity repository_module_core execution_env_docker)
(register_investigation_candidate repository_module_aux)
(attach_diagnostic_tool_to_entity repository_module_aux diagnostic_analyzer)
(assign_test_case_to_entity repository_module_aux test_case_repro)
(prepare_analysis_for_entity repository_module_aux test_case_repro)
(execute_test_suite_against_bundle repository_module_aux regression_suite_b patch_bundle_initial)
(flag_module_preparation repository_module_aux regression_suite_b patch_bundle_initial test_case_repro)
(attach_binary_artifact_to_module repository_module_aux binary_artifact_v1)
(attach_execution_environment_to_entity repository_module_aux execution_env_docker)
(mark_module_build_ready_without_protocol_flag repository_module_aux binary_artifact_v1 execution_env_docker regression_suite_b patch_bundle_initial)
(attach_review_note_to_module repository_module_aux review_note_initial)
(start_module_review repository_module_aux review_note_initial regression_suite_b patch_bundle_initial)
(finalize_module_verification_without_label repository_module_aux)
(assign_fix_candidate_to_entity repository_module_aux trace_record_1 test_case_repro)
(apply_fix_to_module repository_module_aux diagnostic_analyzer trace_record_1)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves repairing invariants for primary_component_a, dependent_component_b, repository_module_core, and repository_module_aux. The goal is to have (invariant_restored) for all of them.


## Assessing Repair Needs  
- The task focuses on repairing invariants for primary_component_a, dependent_component_b, repository_module_core, and repository_module_aux.  
- The goal is to ensure all components have their invariants restored.

## Assessing Repair Needs  
- The task involves multiple entities, including primary_component_a, dependent_component_b, repository_module_core, and repository_module_aux, all marked as repair targets.  
- These entities share resources like test_case_repro, execution_env_docker, test_data, and patch_bundle_initial, which may limit simultaneous repairs.  

- Repository modules are linked to components via module_patchbundle_binding and module_testsuite_binding, with core tied to regression_suite_a and aux to regression_suite_b.  
- To restore invariants, components need analysis prepared, while modules have multiple verification paths like finalize_module_verification_with_final_checks.  

## Planning Repair Steps  
- Start by registering entities like primary_component_a as investigation candidates to begin the repair process.  
- Attach diagnostic tools, such as diagnostic_analyzer, and assign the shared test_case_repro to each entity for testing.  

- Prepare analysis for entities, ensuring analysis_prepared status, which is crucial for components to become ready.  
- For primary_component_a, achieving component_ready involves interface_stable and environment_attachment, setting the stage for patch bundle assembly.

## Sequencing Repairs  
- Focus on completing the repair process for components first, ensuring diagnosed status with test attachments like test_case_repro for primary_component_a.  
- After diagnosing, assign fixes using available traces, such as trace_record_1, and apply them to restore invariants, freeing tools like diagnostic_analyzer for reuse.  

## Managing Module Repairs  
- Prepare analysis for repository modules, requiring analysis_prepared status, to enable further verification steps like finalize_module_verification_without_label.  
- Note that issue markers limit module configurations; only issue_marker_101 is available initially, affecting binding for repository_module_aux.

## Managing Module Preparation  
- To diagnose modules, flag_module_preparation requires analysis_prepared, testsuite_binding, executed, validated, test_attachment, and no interface_compat_flag, which is satisfied with stable interfaces.  
- After flagging, mark_module_build_ready_without_protocol_flag needs binary_binding, env_attachment, and validated status, setting the stage for review.  

## Handling Resource Sharing  
- Review_binding for modules uses attach_review_note_to_module, with review_note_initial available for one module at a time, allowing detachment for reuse.  
- Similarly, shared resources like binary_artifact and exec_env can be attached and detached, ensuring both repository_module_core and repository_module_aux can be processed sequentially.  

## Outlining Repair Sequence  
- Prepare analysis for primary_component_a by registering as an investigation candidate, attaching diagnostic_analyzer, and assigning test_case_repro.  
- For dependent_component_b, detach test_case_repro from primary_component_a, then register, attach diagnostic_profiler, and prepare analysis, ensuring sequential resource use.

## Continuing Module Repairs  
- After fixing repository_module_core, test_case_repro remains attached; detach it to free for reuse with repository_module_aux.  
- Register repository_module_aux as an investigation candidate, then attach diagnostic_analyzer, confirming tools are available post-fixes.  

## Executing Module Tests  
- Assign test_case_repro to repository_module_aux and prepare analysis, ensuring analysis_prepared status for further steps.  
- Execute regression_suite_b against patch_bundle_initial for repository_module_aux, marking it executed and validated, with suite_b no longer available.  

## Finalizing Module Readiness  
- Flag module preparation for repository_module_aux using regression_suite_b and patch_bundle_initial, confirming no interface compatibility flags.  
- Attach binary_artifact_v1, execution_env_docker, and review_note_initial, then mark build ready and finalize verification without labels.  

## Assessing Resource Use  
- Reuse resources like review_note_initial, binary_artifact_v1, and execution_env_docker across modules, ensuring sequential processing.  
- Note no conflicts arise; stable interfaces and absence of compatibility flags support the without_protocol_flag path for reviews.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
